# awscc_storagegateway_tape_pool (Resource)

Creates a custom tape pool for archiving virtual tapes with optional retention lock.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `pool_name` (String) The name of the custom tape pool.
- `storage_class` (String) The storage class associated with the custom pool (S3 Glacier or S3 Glacier Deep Archive).

### Optional

- `retention_lock_time_in_days` (Number) Tape retention lock time in days (up to 36,500 days / 100 years).
- `retention_lock_type` (String) Tape retention lock type. Governance mode allows authorized removal; compliance mode prevents all removal.
- `tags` (Attributes List) A list of up to 50 tags for the tape pool. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--tags))

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Uniquely identifies the resource.
- `pool_arn` (String) The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the custom tape pool.
- `pool_id` (String) The unique identifier of the custom tape pool, extracted from the ARN.

<a id="nestedatt--tags"></a>
### Nested Schema for `tags`

Optional:

- `key` (String) The tag key.
- `value` (String) The tag value.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

In Terraform v1.12.0 and later, the [`import` block](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/import) can be used with the `identity` attribute, for example:

```terraform
import {
  to = awscc_storagegateway_tape_pool.example
  identity = {
    pool_arn = "pool_arn"
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
### Identity Schema

#### Required

- `pool_arn` (String) The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the custom tape pool

#### Optional

- `account_id` (String) AWS Account where this resource is managed
- `region` (String) Region where this resource is managed

In Terraform v1.5.0 and later, the [`import` block](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/import) can be used with the `id` attribute, for example:

```terraform
import {
  to = awscc_storagegateway_tape_pool.example
  id = "pool_arn"
}
```

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
$ terraform import awscc_storagegateway_tape_pool.example "pool_arn"
```
